title: Souverainete
description: Forget everything you know about Minecraft Villagers.
body:
![Art](https://i.ibb.co.com/20SmXSLh/art.png)

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21+-bf9f7a?style=for-the-badge&logo=target&logoColor=white&labelColor=292633) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.com%2Fapi%2Finvites%2FjTSCfBGAUu%3Fwith_counts%3Dtrue&query=%24.approximate_member_count&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=DISCORD&labelColor=292633&color=6a4f5b)](https://discord.gg/jTSCfBGAUu) [![PacketEvents](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/retrooper/packetevents?label=PacketEvents&labelColor=292633&color=bf9f7a&style=for-the-badge&logo=simpleanalytics&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/retrooper/packetevents)
[![BuiltByBit](https://img.shields.io/badge/BuiltByBit-Premium-6a4f5b?style=for-the-badge&logo=builtbybit&logoColor=white&labelColor=292633)](https://builtbybit.com/resources/souverainete.83660) [![Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/Wiki-Available-84bf7a?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitbook&logoColor=white&labelColor=292633)](https://ignis-wiki.gitbook.io/souverainete/) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/souverainete?label=MODRINTH&labelColor=292633&color=6a4f5b&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/souverainete)

![Features](https://i.ibb.co.com/1tpKXt8L/features.png)
![NPC Chat](https://i.ibb.co.com/wNMK7pp4/npchcat.png)
![Defence](https://i.ibb.co.com/v60LWrYn/defence.png)

![Translate](https://i.ibb.co.com/391FRVjg/translate.png)

![Installation](https://i.ibb.co.com/tTsg4CKK/installation.png)

1. Install [PacketEvents](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/packetevents-api.80279/) plugin.
2. Follow [installation instructions](https://ignis-wiki.gitbook.io/ignis#installation).
3. (Optional) It is recommended to install the [VillagesRevamped](https://modrinth.com/datapack/villages-revamped) datapack.
